text:
Created attachment 216906
Update to dnsdist 1.5.0

Please check the upgrade guide before upgrading: https://dnsdist.org/upgrade_guide.html#to-1-5-x

Reworked the Lua options. You can now choose from Lua, LuaJIT and LuaJIT-openresty.

QA:
portlint: OK (1 warning about pkg-descr being too long)
testport: OK (12.1, amd64)
